MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MICHELLE M. CLOWSER OF THE LAW FIRM OF BRYDON, HUGO & PARKER, TEL. NO. 808-0300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT NATIONAL STEEL AND SHIPBUILDING COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE AY DECLARATION IS INSUFFICIENT TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THAT PLAINTIFF WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS INSTALLED BY DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Foster Wheeler Llc (Fka Foster Wheeler Corporation) To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Chew, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Lenard Hugle
Shelley Tinkoff, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Foster Wheeler

After hearing, Plaintiff August Louie's Motion To Compel Defendant Foster Wheeler LLC To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition is GRANTED - Defendant to produce documents by Jan.30, 2009. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. Reporter: Catherine Meyer, CSR # 11596
